title: senecio sericeus var. incisus
intro: Senecio sericeus var. incisus, also known as Hooker's woolly Jacob's ladder, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its high content of pyrrolizidine alkaloids (PA), which have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio sericeus var. incisus include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote wound healing, among other uses. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity.
